title: Claude Code Skill: Integration Test Writer — Auto-Generate API Integration Tests from Endpoint Definitions
description: For QA engineers and full-stack developers, this skill reads endpoint definitions, request/response schemas, and example payloads to generate structured integration test suites so they can achieve consistent API coverage without writing boilerplate test code from scratch.
gumroad_description:
Writing integration test boilerplate from scratch is the most skippable thing on every sprint.

Who this is for:
— QA engineers who write tests after the fact because setup takes too long
— Full-stack developers who know they need API coverage but keep pushing it back
— Leads whose integration test suite has gaps because no one had time to fill them

What's inside:
— 1 ready-to-use SKILL.md file — drop into your project's skills/ folder
— Reads endpoint definitions, schemas, and example payloads to generate test suites
— Structured output: happy path, error cases, and edge conditions included
— Usage guide + real slash-command examples

Consistent API coverage, zero boilerplate. Download and use it today.

Discover more tools like this at mini-on-ai.com
